h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue to list the header/value pairs and confirm the submission format, as they have been doing.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal; the tutor consistently provides the same correction format and the learner repeatedly asks for confirmation without any breakdown or contradiction.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No later tutor turn exists after L4, so no uptake can occur.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No later tutor turn exists after L4, so no uptake can occur.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure for a reversal; the tutor consistently provides the same correction format and the learner repeatedly asks for confirmation without any breakdown or contradiction.
